purpose: Close four reviewed exchange candidates after promotion through D-1000 BX26.

entries.notes: BX26 promotes StandX after current first-party BNB Chain and Solana perpetual-DEX documentation and independent current volume, TVL, and open-interest verification.

BX26 promotes Vest Markets after current first-party perpetual-market documentation and independent current volume, fees, TVL, and open-interest verification. Vest Markets and Vest Exchange remain one entity.
BX26 promotes Tessera V after independent current Solana, Base, and BNB Chain DEX-volume verification. Confidence remains medium because no stable first-party website was recovered.

BX26 promotes Variational as one hybrid entity consolidating the protocol and live Omni perpetual-trading application after current first-party documentation and independent volume and open-interest verification.
